article.summary: Another tanker was attacked in the Strait of Hormuz as renewed hostilities empty the waterway, while a threat by Houthi rebels to blockade Saudi Arabia in the Red Sea heightened regional maritime risks.

article.title: London Stock Exchange to Introduce Nonstop Trading Next Year
article.summary: The London Stock Exchange will open a new venue outside of its regular market hours in a move to offer “near-continuous trading” in the working week.

headline: Korea Expands CBDC Trial to 500,000 Users

article.summary: Phase 1 of Project Hangang opened 81,000 wallets with 42% of them using the CBDC. Phase 2 is bigger, and this time it moves real government money.

headline: Russia's Crypto Law Clears 2 Hurdles, Passage Imminent

article.title: Russia's First Comprehensive Crypto Law Is Two Votes Away From Passing
article.summary: The bill licenses exchanges, caps retail investors at about $3,800 a year, and creates a legal pathway for Russian companies to pay foreign partners in crypto—bypassing Western sanctions.

headline: UK Crypto Faces 6-Month Banking Access Probe

article.title: UK parliamentary group launches probe into crypto sector’s banking challenges
